name: auth-better-auth
description:
better-auth — framework-agnostic authentication for TypeScript. Email/password by default; pluggable social providers (Google, GitHub, etc.). FREE OSS, no vendor lock-in. Adds src/lib/auth.ts (server) + src/lib/auth-client.ts (browser) + Next.js route handler at /api/auth/[...all]/route.ts. Pairs with prisma for the user/session/account tables.

After scaffold: run `pnpm exec better-auth migrate` (or `pnpm db:push`) to create the auth tables, then set BETTER_AUTH_SECRET in .env.local.
post_install_steps: Generate auth tables in your DB: `pnpm exec better-auth generate` then `pnpm db:push`
Set BETTER_AUTH_SECRET in .env.local (generate with: openssl rand -base64 32)
Optional: enable social providers (Google/GitHub) by adding their client id/secret to .env.local and uncommenting the providers block in src/lib/auth.ts
